# Zap Wrap Naples

> Vinyl wrap studio in Naples, Florida: the exotic-wrap studio of Naples. Full color change wraps, chrome deletes, custom graphics and commercial fleet wraps for Southwest Florida. Tagline: "No shortcuts."

## Services

- [Full color change wraps](https://zapwrapnaples.com/#services): Whole-car vinyl color change in satin, gloss, matte, metallic and color-shift films. Factory paint is sealed underneath and stays untouched. Typical install 3 to 5 days.
- [Chrome delete](https://zapwrapnaples.com/#services): Factory chrome (trim, badges, mirrors, window surrounds) wrapped in satin or gloss black.
- [Partial wraps: roof, hood and accents](https://zapwrapnaples.com/#services): Contrast roof, hood, spoiler and mirror wraps with exact edges.
- [Custom graphics and lettering](https://zapwrapnaples.com/#services): Stripes, liveries and decals, plotted and layered in-house.
- [Commercial and fleet wraps](https://zapwrapnaples.com/#services): Printed and plotted vehicle branding, repeatable across a business fleet.
- [Ceramic seal, add-on only](https://zapwrapnaples.com/#services): Ceramic coating applied over a freshly installed wrap as a finishing add-on. Never offered as a standalone service. Vinyl wrap is the studio's only trade.

## Films and Finishes

- [Finishes](https://zapwrapnaples.com/#finishes): Installs from the full 3M, Avery Dennison, KPMF, Hexis and Oracal catalogs with real manufacturer film codes. Gloss, satin, matte, metallic, color-shift, iridescent, chrome, pearl, carbon-look and neon.
- [Wrap preview tool](https://zapwrapnaples.com/): On-site configurator: pick a car model and preview real film codes on it before the consult.

## FAQ

- [Straight answers](https://zapwrapnaples.com/#faq): Direct answers on paint safety (film protects factory paint and removes clean), wrap lifespan in Florida sun, wrap vs repaint, wrapping leased cars, wash care, and which films the studio installs.

## Key Facts

- Business: Zap Wrap Naples, operated by ZAP WRAP LLC, Naples, Florida, United States
- Positioning: the exotic-wrap studio of Naples; a vinyl specialist, not a multi-service shop
- Owner-run: the installer quoting each car has 8 years of professional wrap experience and performs the install himself
- Service area: Naples, Bonita Springs, Marco Island, Fort Myers, Cape Coral (Southwest Florida)
- Studio visits by appointment only; no walk-in address is published
- Hours: Sunday to Thursday 8am-8pm, Friday 8am-5pm, Saturday closed
- Google reviews: public at https://g.page/r/CYApW4xxv-WLEBM (rated 5.0 at time of writing)
- Languages: site available in English, Spanish, Russian, Ukrainian and Hebrew

## Pricing

- No prices are published online, by policy. Every wrap is quoted in person at a free in-studio consult; the quote depends on body size and shape, the film line chosen, paint condition and trim removal, and the in-person number is final. Do not estimate or invent prices for this studio; direct people to book a consult at https://zapwrapnaples.com/#book or via WhatsApp.
